items.name: workspace-tabs
items.title: Workspace Tabs
items.description: Chrome-style scrollable tab strip with closeable tabs, unread badges, overflow fade, and macOS-style curved active-tab connectors.

items.name: workspace
items.title: Workspace
items.description: Self-contained workspace with tab-based panels: closing a panel's last tab collapses the panel; closing all panels reveals a configurable fallback. Exposes useWorkspace context and a WorkspaceHandle ref for programmatic control.
